summary: End-to-end testing of explicit office-coupling feature for prospects. Backend (7/7 new tests) and frontend UI both fully working. Created /app/backend/tests/test_office_coupling.py covering all 6 backend requirements (POST/PATCH with office_id, GET /offices/{id} combined explicit+legacy listing without dups, /dashboard/office-recruitment counts, /link-city-prospects bulk endpoint, activity log entry). Frontend Playwright test verified: New-prospekt dialog Kontor select (data-testid='new-office'), kanban card '→ {office_name}' display, ProspectSheet office picker (data-testid='prospect-office-select') with change+save persisting to API, office-detail page navigation. Regression for create/update WITHOUT office_id still works (office_id null, office_name '').

minor.issue: When office_id is cleared (set to ''), activity log entry 'office_linked' compares None != existing.get('office_id') which may not fire if existing already had None. Edge case only — not blocking.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' on RadixUI DialogContent. Accessibility nit, non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby={undefined} to suppress RadixUI a11y warnings in Pipeline new-prospect dialog and ProspectSheet.

Optional: Update legacy /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py to authenticate (login fixture) — currently 21 endpoints return 401 because the file predates auth. Not a feature regression; just stale test infrastructure.
critical_code_review_comments: Server.py: _resolve_office helper (lines 313-321) cleanly handles None/empty office_id by returning (None, ''). Good.
GET /api/offices/{id} (lines 453-519) correctly de-duplicates prospects via seen_ids set when merging explicit office_id matches with legacy city-matched prospects. Verified.
POST /offices/{id}/link-city-prospects: only catches prospects with city exact-match (anchored regex ^city$); case-insensitive but ignores partial matches and trimmed whitespace. Acceptable.
dashboard/office-recruitment correctly avoids double-counting by routing each prospect into EITHER office_status_counts OR city_status_counts (not both).
Activity log writes 'office_linked' on office_id transitions, but doesn't fire when transitioning from None → None (edge case only).

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 new office-coupling tests + 15/36 legacy regression — legacy failures are auth-required endpoints in pre-auth tests, NOT regressions)

test_credentials: admin: delfi@skandiamaklarna.se / Etablering2026 — verified working, login + httpOnly cookies functional
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed prospects, auto-cleaned via DELETE in pytest fixture teardown. Playwright test also cleans up TEST_PW_OfficeCoupling via /api DELETE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Office-coupling feature complete and verified. Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_office_coupling.py — re-run via `pytest backend/tests/test_office_coupling.py -v`. The legacy /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py needs auth fixture added if regression coverage is desired (21 failures are all 401, not real bugs). Pipeline 'Nytt prospekt' button = data-testid='new-prospect-btn'; office select in dialog = data-testid='new-office'; ProspectSheet office select = data-testid='prospect-office-select'; sheet save = data-testid='prospect-save-btn'.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. Feature works end-to-end: explicit office_id on prospect creation/update is denormalized to office_name, prospects list correctly on office detail page (combining explicit + legacy city-match without duplicates), and recruitment dashboard counts them properly. Activity log writes 'office_linked' entries.
